penalties.description: Video content is not suitable for scoring - either too dark to evaluate or educational material rather than performance attempt

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Both models agreed that this video cannot be scored as a task performance. Claude identified it as educational material with static images, while GPT-4o reported the video as too dark to evaluate. In either case, no actual task execution is visible, resulting in incomplete task status and zero score.
